Class BaseGTNetExchangeService

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.service.BaseGTNetExchangeService
Direct Known Subclasses:
GTNetHistoricalImportService, GTNetHistoryquoteService, GTNetLastpriceService
public abstract class BaseGTNetExchangeService extends Object
Abstract base class for GTNet exchange services (lastprice and historyquote). Provides shared functionality for:
  • Supplier priority ordering with randomization
  • Common exchange patterns
See Also:
  • for intraday price exchange
  • for historical price exchange

    Sorts AC_OPEN suppliers using optimized scoring algorithm: coverage x success_rate as primary, priority as secondary, and random shuffle as tertiary for ties.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseGTNetExchangeService

      public BaseGTNetExchangeService()

  • Method Details

    • getSuppliersByPriorityWithRandomization

      protected List<GTNet> getSuppliersByPriorityWithRandomization(List<GTNet> suppliers, GTNetExchangeKindType exchangeKind)
      Randomizes suppliers within the same priority level. Suppliers are grouped by their consumerUsage priority value, sorted by priority ascending, and randomized within each group to balance load across suppliers at the same priority level.
      Parameters:
      suppliers - list of suppliers to organize
      exchangeKind - the exchange kind to determine which entity's consumerUsage to use
      Returns:
      list of suppliers randomized within priority groups

    • getSuppliersByScoreWithRandomization

      protected List<GTNet> getSuppliersByScoreWithRandomization(List<GTNet> suppliers, GTNetExchangeKindType exchangeKind, SupplierScoreCalculator scoreCalculator, SupplierInstrumentFilter filter, Set<Integer> requestedInstrumentIds)
      Sorts AC_OPEN suppliers using optimized scoring algorithm: coverage x success_rate as primary, priority as secondary, and random shuffle as tertiary for ties. This method provides better supplier selection than priority-only by considering: - How many of the requested instruments each supplier actually supports (coverage) - How reliable each supplier has been historically (success rate) Note: This method is ONLY for AC_OPEN suppliers. AC_PUSH_OPEN suppliers should continue using getSuppliersByPriorityWithRandomization().
      Parameters:
      suppliers - list of AC_OPEN suppliers to organize
      exchangeKind - the exchange kind for priority lookup
      scoreCalculator - the pre-initialized score calculator with success rates
      filter - the instrument filter for coverage calculation
      requestedInstrumentIds - the set of instrument IDs being requested
      Returns:
      list of suppliers sorted by score desc, priority asc, with random shuffle for ties
